title: Homebrew Formula: llama.cpp
permitted_uses: Local Apple Silicon runtime install planning for the OpenClinXR offline model benchmark path.
claims_supported: Homebrew provides a `brew install llama.cpp` formula.
The formula reports MIT license metadata.
The formula provides Apple Silicon bottle support for current macOS releases.
claims_not_supported: That any particular GGUF model is downloaded, licensed, or benchmarked.
That local inference satisfies clinical simulation latency, quality, or safety requirements.
That Homebrew-installed llama.cpp should be bundled into an Azure Functions or browser deployment.
